tryAssign.ok: ok=11
tryAssign.bad: err=strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax
tryDiscard.ok: ok
tryDiscard.bad: err=strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax

tryEAssignWrapf.bad: err=assignWrap "abc": strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax
tryEDiscardErr.ok: ok
tryEDiscardErr.bad: err=ping

notNilAssign.bad: err=q: nil value
notNilDiscard.ok: ok
notNilDiscard.bad: err=q: nil value
notNilEDiscardErr.ok: ok
